title: IMH4U 100subs Pack
description: The IMH4U 100subs Pack I FPS Boost I Quality Of Life I PVP Essentials
body:
# 🔥 The Official IMH4U 100-Subscribers Modpack!

Hello, and welcome to the modpack I created just for you—my amazing 100-subscribers community! This pack is the definitive way to experience the kind of gameplay you see on my YouTube channel. Whether you're a new viewer or a long-time subscriber, this pack has everything you need to enhance your Minecraft experience.

## ✨ Core Pillars of the Pack

We focus on three key areas to ensure the best performance and gameplay experience:

### 🚀 Increased FPS & Performance

I know nobody likes a laggy game! This pack is built to breathe new life into older PCs and give modern rigs incredibly high frame rates.

* **Key Optimization Mods:** We include staples like **Sodium, Lithium, and Starlight** to completely overhaul rendering, physics, and lighting.
* **Minimal Visual Impact:** These optimizations are designed to boost performance without heavily changing the vanilla look of the game.

### 🧭 Quality of Life (QoL) Enhancements

These mods smooth out the rough edges of vanilla Minecraft, making everything easier and more intuitive.

* **Better Inventory:** See recipes and check item usage right from your inventory with **Roughly Enough Items (REI)**.
* **Map and Waypoints:** Never get lost again with a reliable mini-map and waypoint system (e.g., **Xaero's Minimap** or similar).
* **Better Chat/Keybinds:** Small tweaks to make interacting with the world and other players much cleaner.

### ⚔️ PvP Essentials

Ready to jump into the action? This pack includes must-have features for competitive players, focusing on clarity and reaction time.

* **Damage Indicators:** See how much damage you're doing to mobs and players instantly.
* **Toggle Sprint/Sneak:** Quality of life features specifically for combat, reducing strain on your fingers.
* **Clearer Textures (Optional):** We include configuration options for better visibility during fast-paced fights.

## 🔗 Get Started

1.  Download the pack using your favorite launcher (T Launcher, Prism, MultiMC, etc.).
2.  Ensure you are using **Minecraft [1.20.8]** and **[Fabric]**.
3.  Load it up and enjoy!

**➡️ Come Play With Me!**
Don't forget to **subscribe to my YouTube channel, IMH4U**, to see me using this pack in my latest videos! Let me know in the comments on my latest video what you think of the pack!
